sentence: 他因收受贿赂被调查。
pinyin: Tā yīn shōushòu huìlù bèi diàochá.
english: He was investigated for accepting bribes.

meaning: 1. to sequester; 2. to seize (assets); 3. to seal up; 4. to close down
sentence: 执法人员对该店实施了查封。
pinyin: Zhífǎ rényuán duì gāi diàn shíshī le cháfēng.
english: Law enforcement officers sealed up the store.

sentence: 语言障碍让他在国外生活很困难。
pinyin: Yǔyán zhàng'ài ràng tā zài guówài shēnghuó hěn kùnnan.
english: The language barrier made life abroad very difficult for him.

sentence: 他的论调听起来有点极端。
pinyin: Tā de lùndiào tīng qǐlái yǒudiǎn jíduān.
english: His argument sounds a bit extreme.

meaning: 1. to lose output; 2. a drop in crop yield; 3. reduction in production
sentence: 干旱导致今年粮食严重减产。
pinyin: Gānhàn dǎozhì jīnnián liángshi yánzhòng jiǎnchǎn.
english: The drought caused a serious drop in grain production this year.

sentence: 双方呼吁通过谈判解决武装冲突。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng hūyù tōngguò tánpàn jiějué wǔzhuāng chōngtū.
english: Both sides call for resolving the armed conflict through negotiations.

meaning: 1. to stop using; 2. to suspend; 3. to discontinue; 4. to disable
sentence: 这个账号已被停用，请联系客服。
pinyin: Zhège zhànghào yǐ bèi tíngyòng, qǐng liánxì kèfú.
english: This account has been disabled; please contact customer service.

sentence: 种族灭绝是国际法严格禁止的罪行。
pinyin: Zhǒngzú mièjué shì guójìfǎ yángé jìnzhǐ de zuìxíng.
english: Genocide is a crime strictly prohibited by international law.

sentence: 你可以给我发私信，我会尽快回复。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ gěi wǒ fā sīxìn, wǒ huì jǐnkuài huífù.
english: You can send me a private message and I'll reply as soon as possible.

sentence: 请把这个文件拷贝一份给我。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhège wénjiàn kǎobèi yī fèn gěi wǒ.
english: Please make a copy of this file for me.

sentence: 本报记者昨日对此事进行了采访。
pinyin: Běn bào jìzhě zuórì duì cǐ shì jìnxíng le cǎifǎng.
english: A reporter from this newspaper covered the story yesterday.

meaning: to band together; to team up
sentence: 外地来的同学喜欢抱团取暖。
pinyin: Wàidì lái de tóngxué xǐhuān bào tuán qǔ nuǎn.
english: Students from out of town tend to band together for mutual support.

sentence: 登记时需要填写户主的姓名。
pinyin: Dēngjì shí xūyào tiánxiě hù zhǔ de xìngmíng.
english: When registering, you need to fill in the name of the head of the household.

meaning: pornographic film; rushes (of a movie); (old) fur color
sentence: 导演在剪辑前要先看完全部毛片。
pinyin: Dǎoyǎn zài jiǎnjí qián yào xiān kàn wán quánbù máo piàn.
english: The director needs to watch all the rushes before starting the edit.

meaning: to join the two sections (of a linear structure: bridge, dike etc) to
sentence: 大桥两端终于顺利合龙了。
pinyin: Dàqiáo liǎng duān zhōngyú shùnlì hé lóng le.
english: The two ends of the bridge finally joined together successfully.

sentence: 中世纪的农奴没有人身自由。
pinyin: Zhōngshìjì de nóngnú méiyǒu rénshēn zìyóu.
english: Medieval serfs had no personal freedom.

sentence: 保守党在这次选举中赢得了多数席位。
pinyin: Bǎoshǒudǎng zài zhè cì xuǎnjǔ zhōng yíngdéle duōshù xíwèi.
english: The Conservative Party won a majority of seats in this election.

meaning: troops under one's command; subordinate; affiliated to a ministry
sentence: 他把任务分配给自己的部属去完成。
pinyin: Tā bǎ rènwù fēnpèi gěi zìjǐ de bùshǔ qù wánchéng.
english: He assigned the task to his subordinates to complete.

sentence: 物质生活好了，也要注重精神文明。
pinyin: Wùzhì shēnghuó hǎo le, yě yào zhùzhòng jīngshén wénmíng.
english: Even when material life improves, we should also pay attention to spiritual culture.

meaning: to leave or enter a country
sentence: 出入境手续需要提前办好。
pinyin: Chūrùjìng shǒuxù xūyào tíqián bàn hǎo.
english: Immigration and customs procedures need to be handled in advance.

sentence: 内蒙古的牧区辽阔，适合放牧。
pinyin: Nèi Měnggǔ de mùqū liáokuò, shìhé fàngmù.
english: The grazing lands of Inner Mongolia are vast and suitable for herding.

sentence: 他税前年收入大约二十万元。
pinyin: Tā shuìqián nián shōurù dàyuē èrshí wàn yuán.
english: His pretax annual income is about 200,000 yuan.

sentence: 这台超级计算机每秒能完成亿次运算。
pinyin: Zhè tái chāojí jìsuànjī měi miǎo néng wánchéng yì cì yùnsuàn.
english: This supercomputer can perform hundreds of millions of calculations per second.

meaning: (of an object or device) designed to stand vertically; upright; (of an
sentence: 厨房里放了一台立式冰箱。
pinyin: Chúfáng lǐ fàngle yī tái lìshì bīngxiāng.
english: An upright refrigerator was placed in the kitchen.

sentence: 这种中药有活血化瘀的作用。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng zhōngyào yǒu huóxuè huàyū de zuòyòng.
english: This Chinese herbal medicine helps improve blood circulation and remove blood stasis.

meaning: to accomplish much; to have good prospects; to have a promising future
sentence: 年轻人在这个行业里大有作为。
pinyin: Niánqīng rén zài zhège hángyè lǐ dàyǒuzuòwéi.
english: Young people can accomplish a great deal in this industry.

meaning: see 開房間|开房间[kai1 fang2 jian1]
sentence: 他们到前台开房，登记了身份证。
pinyin: Tāmen dào qiántái kāi fáng, dēngjìle shēnfènzhèng.
english: They went to the front desk to check into a room and showed their ID.

sentence: 天气好的时候，我喜欢骑车上班。
pinyin: Tiānqì hǎo de shíhou, wǒ xǐhuān qíchē shàngbān.
english: When the weather is nice, I like to ride my bike to work.

sentence: 爷爷每天晚饭喝一小杯白酒。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān wǎnfàn hē yī xiǎo bēi báijiǔ.
english: Grandpa drinks a small glass of baijiu with dinner every day.

sentence: 他从小就有成为科学家的抱负。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù yǒu chéngwéi kēxuéjiā de bàofù.
english: He has had the ambition to become a scientist since he was young.

sentence: 这次考试的试题比上次难多了。
pinyin: Zhè cì kǎoshì de shì tí bǐ shàng cì nán duō le.
english: The exam questions this time were much harder than last time.

meaning: 1. place to return to; 2. home; 3. final destination; 4. ending
sentence: 她觉得家才是自己真正的归宿。
pinyin: Tā juéde jiā cái shì zìjǐ zhēnzhèng de guīsù.
english: She feels that home is her true place of belonging.

meaning: 1. to be on the move; 2. to roam or wander; 3. to circulate (of goods
sentence: 土地流转让农民增加了不少收入。
pinyin: Tǔ dì liú zhuǎn ràng nóng mín zēng jiā le bù shǎo shōu rù.
english: The circulation of land use rights has significantly increased farmers' income.

sentence: 我非常敬佩她的勇气。
pinyin: Wǒ fēicháng jìngpèi tā de yǒngqì.
english: I greatly admire her courage.

meaning: 1. to go on a tour; 2. to have an outing
sentence: 五一假期很多家庭选择出游。
pinyin: Wǔ Yī jiàqī hěn duō jiātíng xuǎnzé chūyóu.
english: Many families choose to go on outings during the May Day holiday.

meaning: 1. to turn; 2. to go around a corner
sentence: 在前面那个路口右转弯就到了。
pinyin: Zài qián miàn nà ge lù kǒu yòu zhuǎn wān jiù dào le.
english: Turn right at the intersection up ahead and you'll be there.

meaning: 1. to recur (of a disease); 2. to reappear; 3. to relapse (into a form
sentence: 他的旧病最近又复发了。
pinyin: Tā de jiù bìng zuì jìn yòu fù fā le.
english: His old illness has relapsed recently.

sentence: 这门课侧重培养学生的口语能力。
pinyin: Zhè mén kè cè zhòng péiyǎng xuésheng de kǒuyǔ nénglì.
english: This course places particular emphasis on developing students' spoken language ability.

sentence: 那位演员最近卷入了一场绯闻。
pinyin: Nà wèi yǎn yuán zuì jìn juǎn rù le yī chǎng fēi wén.
english: That actor recently got caught up in a scandal.

meaning: 1. in arrears; 2. behind in payments; 3. to default on one's debt
sentence: 他拖欠了两个月的房租。
pinyin: Tā tuōqiàn le liǎng gè yuè de fángzū.
english: He is two months behind on rent.

meaning: 1. to ask for compensation; 2. to claim damages; 3. claim for damages
sentence: 产品有质量问题，他向商家提出了索赔。
pinyin: Chǎnpǐn yǒu zhìliàng wèntí, tā xiàng shāngjia tíchū le suǒpéi.
english: The product had a quality issue, so he filed a claim for damages against the seller.

meaning: 1. balance (financial); 2. discrepancy (in a sum or quota); 3. differe
sentence: 请核对一下账单，看看差额在哪里。
pinyin: Qǐng héduì yīxià zhàngdān, kànkan chā'é zài nǎlǐ.
english: Please check the bill and see where the discrepancy is.

meaning: to break the rules; to violate regulations
sentence: 他因为违章停车被罚了款。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi wéizhāng tíngchē bèi fále kuǎn.
english: He was fined for illegal parking.

meaning: to mention; to speak of; to talk about
sentence: 每次谈起家乡，他都很兴奋。
pinyin: Měi cì tánqǐ jiāxiāng, tā dōu hěn xīngfèn.
english: Every time he talks about his hometown, he gets very excited.

meaning: extended family; big family; harmonious group
sentence: 他们家是个大家庭，每周末聚在一起吃饭。
pinyin: Tā men jiā shì ge dà jiā tíng, měi zhōu mò jù zài yī qǐ chī fàn.
english: Their family is a big extended family that gathers every weekend for a meal.

sentence: 我们从不同维度分析这个问题。
pinyin: Wǒmen cóng bùtóng wéidù fēnxī zhège wèntí.
english: We analyze this problem from different dimensions.

sentence: 最近的星系距离我们约两百万光年。
pinyin: Zuìjìn de xīngxì jùlí wǒmen yuē liǎng bǎi wàn guāngnián.
english: The nearest galaxy is approximately two million light-years away from us.

sentence: 祈祷结束时大家齐声说阿门。
pinyin: Qídǎo jiéshù shí dàjiā qíshēng shuō āmén.
english: At the end of the prayer, everyone said amen in unison.

sentence: 她去药房买了感冒药。
pinyin: Tā qù yàofáng mǎi le gǎnmào yào.
english: She went to the pharmacy to buy cold medicine.

sentence: 技师检查了汽车的底盘有没有损坏。
pinyin: Jìshī jiǎnchá le qìchē de dǐpán yǒu méiyǒu sǔnhuài.
english: The technician checked whether the car's chassis was damaged.
